description: Style Notescullers is a celebration of life at its fullest, most unusual and least expected. Scullers is for those who take life on with self-assurance and soul. Add to your collection a semi formal long sleeved light blue shirt to get that desired relaxed Fit. The minimalistic and simple design are just right to strike a semi formal look which can be paired wtih jeans or even formal trousers.Product DescriptionLight blue, spread collared shirt with a full buttoned placket, long sleeves with patch pocket on the left chest with Scullers' logo and a curved hemMaterial and Care100% combed cottonDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or low dry in shadeLow iron inside outSizeRelaxed FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size 40
